steps.title: Write the area equation
steps.content:
Let $w$ be the width. The length is twice the width, so the length is $2w$. The area equation is
$$w(2w)=288$$

steps.title: Solve for the width
steps.content:
Simplify and take the positive square root.
$$2w^2=288$$
$$w^2=144$$
$$w=12$$
The answer is A.
